label: 1562 CE
era_summary: Year 1562 (MDLXII) was a common year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1562: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain, Venice-Turkey, Tripoli, 1559-65. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1562: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Portugal-Moluccans (Ternate), 1552-65; Spain, Venice-Turkey, Tripoli, 1559-65. Maddison records GDP/capita 1535 (ESP, 1562) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
